mnemonics: FETCH-DECODE-EXECUTE: Fundamental CPU cycle. Friends Don't Eat (the) Cake, (it's) Exclusive.
keyPoints: The CPU fetches an instruction from memory using the program counter (PC).
The control unit decodes the instruction to determine the required operation.
The Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU) executes the operation, which may involve reading/writing data from/to registers or memory.
commonMistakes: Confusing the roles of the control unit (decodes instructions) and the ALU (executes operations).
Forgetting that the program counter (PC) holds the address of the *next* instruction, not the current one being executed.
